name: Mitsuko Takayanagi
description: Mitsuko Takayanagi is a character from the original video anime Mistreated Bride. They have been indexed as female adult with brown eyes and purple hair that is to waist length. In her early 30s. Wife to Ichiro and mother of Achan. She moves to the Takayanaki family estate from Tokyo when her husband desides to return to the area of his birth after several years of marriage.
creator: MarkLS
